description: The GlowCircle component is used to make the circle that surrounds default spawn areas.

fields.Radius: The radius of the circle visual.
fields.Height: The height of the walls for the glow visual.
fields.Color: The color of the glow visual.
fields._cylinderOffset: The field to drive with the offset of the cylinder used for this visual.
fields._cylinderRadius: The field to drive with the radius of the cylinder used for this visual.
fields._cylinderHeight: The field to drive with the height of the cylinder used for this visual.
fields._circleQuadSize: The field to drive with the size of the cylinder faces used for this visual.
fields._circleTint: The field to drive with the color of the circle used for this visual.
fields._cylinderTint: The field to drive with the color of the cylinder used for this visual.

usage: Doesn't need to be used by the user. Is auto generated by spawn points when they make their visual.
